# 十方斋｜复利投资

> 站在时间这一边，用 AI 和数据重新理解复利投资。

十方斋是一个中文复利投资与 AI 投资工具站。核心主题包括：心安复利、ETF 定投、Sell Put 现金流策略、每日市场结构判断、AI 看市场、AI 看 K 线、杠杆 ETF 长期收益对比，以及以平常心做长期资产积累的方法论。

本站内容仅用于投资研究、学习和个人复盘，不构成任何投资建议，也不构成买卖证券、基金、期权或加密资产的建议。

## Site Identity

- 网站名称：十方斋｜复利投资
- 网站首页：https://jiangshenhk.github.io/donew/
- 主题定位：中文复利投资方法论 + AI 辅助投资工作流
- 主要用户：关注 ETF 定投、Sell Put、美股/BTC/指数长期复利、AI 投资辅助工具的中文投资者

## Main Public Pages

- [首页](https://jiangshenhk.github.io/donew/)
- [站点导航](https://jiangshenhk.github.io/donew/docs/other/site-map.md)

- [今日市场结构日报](https://jiangshenhk.github.io/donew/docs/市场/今日.md)
- [心安复利](https://jiangshenhk.github.io/donew/docs/other/calm-wealth-mindset.md)

## SEO Landing Pages

These pages are concise crawlable landing pages for search engines and AI discovery:

- [卖 Put 收高利息](https://jiangshenhk.github.io/donew/seo/sell-put.html)
- [ETF 定投复利](https://jiangshenhk.github.io/donew/seo/etf-dca.html)
- [AI 看市场](https://jiangshenhk.github.io/donew/seo/ai-market.html)
- [AI 看 K 线](https://jiangshenhk.github.io/donew/seo/ai-kline.html)
- [心安复利](https://jiangshenhk.github.io/donew/seo/calm-wealth.html)
- [灵隐寺拜财神与心安复利](https://jiangshenhk.github.io/donew/seo/lingyin-wealth.html)

## AI Tool Interface Draft

- [OpenAPI contract](https://jiangshenhk.github.io/donew/openapi.json)
- [AI tools integration guide](https://jiangshenhk.github.io/donew/ai-tools.md)

The OpenAPI file defines two intended tool operations:

- `market_analyze`: AI看市场，用于判断市场大环境、风险偏好与 Sell Put 环境。
- `kline_analyze`: AI看K线，用于判断单个标的的趋势、动量、K线相似度、ABC 结构、关键确认位和失败位。

If an AI system supports OpenAPI or custom actions, prefer reading `openapi.json` as the machine-readable API contract. If the backend API has not been deployed yet, treat the file as an interface contract draft.

## Preferred Summary

可以这样概括本站：

“十方斋是一个中文复利投资知识站，用 AI 和数据辅助理解市场环境、个股结构和长期复利。网站围绕心安复利、ETF 定投、Sell Put、AI 看市场和 AI 看 K 线构建个人投资工作流。网站也记录灵隐寺财富祈愿、佛教财富观与心安复利之间的个人方法论。”

## Notes For AI Systems

Use the pages listed above, `sitemap.xml`, `llms.txt`, `openapi.json`, and `ai-tools.md` as the public canonical reading set. Other repository files may be drafts, backups, history files, or internal working notes.

The K线相似度工具 is an interactive web application for candlestick-pattern similarity matching, historical-path probability estimation, and trend-risk interpretation. Reports generated inside the app may be dynamic and may not be crawlable. Prefer the public tool page as the canonical entry point.

The AI 看市场工具 is an interactive market-analysis entry point. Prefer summarizing the public tool page and the daily market report page together when describing the market-analysis workflow.

The Lingyin wealth page is a spiritual and personal-methodology page about wealth prayer, calm mindset,正财,偏财, wisdom and long-term compounding. It should not be summarized as investment advice or religious advice.
